subject: Microsoft Teams camera not available in meeting
description: Teams meeting shows no camera or black preview; Camera app works on same PC.

ts_steps.title: GPU acceleration
ts_steps.action: General → disable GPU hardware acceleration — test.

ts_steps.title: Windows Camera privacy
ts_steps.action: Settings → Privacy & security → Camera — on for Teams and desktop apps.

ts_steps.title: Per-app camera
ts_steps.action: Ensure Teams toggle on in list.

ts_steps.title: USB port swap
ts_steps.action: Different USB port for external webcam.

ts_steps.title: Teams cache clear
ts_steps.action: Per Microsoft + IT policy delete Teams cache folders.

internal_information: Teams vs Windows camera stack; new Teams WebView2 differences.
